payload.launch_target_command: bash -lc 'python -c "import cadquery, gmsh; print(\"geometry gui ready\")"; xterm'
notes: Agents must operate this GUI through the container noVNC endpoint and OpenClaw browser control.
macOS host desktop automation, PeekabooBridge, and OS Accessibility permissions are not part of this canonical path.
